channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rangers putting goalie Igor Shesterkin on IR with an upper body injury, AP source says
item.description: New York Rangers goaltender Igor Shesterkin is going on injured reserve, according to a person with knowledge of the decision. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity Tuesday because the moved had not been announced. The person said Shesterkin has an upper-body injury.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lenny Randle, major leaguer repeatedly in the spotlight for 12 seasons, dies at 75
item.description: MURRIETA, Calif. (AP) — Lenny Randle, a big league player for 12 seasons who spoke five languages, performed stand-up comedy, was dubbed “The Most Interesting Man in Baseball” and was suspended for punching his Texas Rangers manager, has died. He was 75.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saunders scores 30 as BYU wins Big 12 opener
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored a career-high 30 points and BYU cruised to a 76-56 victory over Arizona State on Tuesday in a Big 12 Conference opener.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Holiday Classic: Father Judge 80, Carlsbad 70
item.description: In the Third-Place game for the National Bracket of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Father Judge High School from Philadelphia, PA defeats Carlsbad 80-70.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Ruben Amorim is 'very excited' about where 14th-place Man United can go in 2025
item.description: His team is entering 2025 in 14th place in the Premier League but Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says he's “very excited” about the year ahead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Michigan defense pressures Milroe all day, Wolverines beat No. 11 Alabama 19-13 in ReliaQuest Bowl
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A year removed from winning the national championship, Michigan finished its first season under Sherrone Moore with a victory setting the tone for a bright future. Moore replaced Jim Harbaugh after the former Wolverines coach left for the NFL's Los Angeles Chargers last winter.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL teams doing 'extensive homework' on Jon Gruden since controversial emails as offseason approaches: report
item.description: With Jon Gruden three years removed from resigning from his last coaching gigs, NFL teams are reportedly doing "extensive homework" on him as the offseason approaches.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trans athlete speaks out against colleges for not offering full scholarship to compete as women's runner
item.description: Transgender NCAA track and field athlete Sadie Schreiner lamented the lack of options that have been presented to trans athletes looking to transfer in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Late-game stop leads Michigan football to upset victory over Alabama in ReliaQuest Bowl
item.description: The Michigan Wolverines upset the No. 11 ranked Alabama Crimson Tide 19-13 behind their stellar defense in the ReliaQuest Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Brock Purdy’s bruised elbow not long-term issue after 49ers’ home-finale fiasco
item.description: Brock Purdy avoided long-term damage to his surgically repaired elbow but Monday night's contusion and nerve issue will likely keep him from playing in the 49ers' season-ending game Sunday at Arizona.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Resting or playing running back Saquon Barkley is a tougher decision than it seems for Eagles
item.description: Saquon Barkley’s pursuit of Eric Dickerson’s 40-year-old rushing record could get grounded by his coach. Nick Sirianni’s decision is more difficult than it seems. Barkley needs 101 yards rushing against his former team on Sunday to set the NFL’s single-season record.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Caitlin Clark battled through culture wars en route to historic 2024
item.description: Caitlin Clark had a historic 2024 in both the college and professional basketball levels, all while her name was being used in culture wars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Boise State leans into underdog role ahead of CFP game
item.description: The Boise State Broncos have asked everyone to count them out as they embrace the underdog role ahead of their College Football Playoff matchup against Penn State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Detroit loss continues a trend
item.description: Why are the 49ers 6-10? One of the biggest reasons is having just two takeaways in the last six games.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: 6 former Florida State basketball players sue legendary coach over unpaid NIL compensation
item.description: Six former Florida State basketball players are suing longtime Seminoles head coach Leonard Hamilton over unpaid NIL compensation that totals $1.5 million
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brock Purdy's elbow was 'on fire' after hit but he says his surgically repaired ligament is fine
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Brock Purdy hurt his surgically repaired throwing elbow late in a loss to the Detroit Lions on Monday night, the latest blow in an injury-plagued season for the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions take down 49ers as Dan Campbell's 'full throttle' mindset saw starters play entire game
item.description: The Detroit Lions got a bit of revenge on the West Coast, taking down the San Francisco 49ers, 40-34, in Week 17 where 4 different players found the end zone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coby White, Torrey Craig lead the Bulls past the Hornets in overtime, 115-108
item.description: Coby White narrowly missed his first career triple-double, finishing with 23 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists, and Torrey Craig scored 18 with five 3-pointers after halftime as the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Charlotte Hornets 115-108 in overtime Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The upperclassmen: Oregon, Ohio St. leaned on well-traveled veteran QBs to reach Rose Bowl, CFP
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Oregon and Ohio State are two of the most daunting teams left in the College Football Playoff in no small part because they've both got starting quarterbacks who had already seen — and beaten — just about everything they're ever going to face at this level of the sport before they
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee remains No. 1 following quiet week in AP Top 25, No. 15 UCLA climbs 7 spots
item.description: Tennessee remains No. 1 after a quiet holiday week in the AP Top 25. The Volunteers received 41 first-place votes from a 61-person media panel in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released Monday. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Six former Florida State players sue coach Leonard Hamilton over failed NIL payments
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Six former Florida State basketball players sued Seminoles coach Leonard Hamilton on Monday, alleging he failed to make good on a promise to get each of them $250,000 in name, image and likeness compensation. The plaintiffs — Darin Green Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: On his 40th, LeBron James says he could play "another 5 or 7 years." He won't stay around that long
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James celebrated his 40th birthday on Monday with gratitude for his basketball longevity and optimism about his future with the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SDFNL All-Star Showcase
item.description:
Boys All-Star Game : Blue Stars 21- Red Stars 17
Girls Flag Football All-Star Game: Blue Stars 6 - Red Stars 0
San Diego 13U Youth Super Bowl: San Diego Bolts 34 - Oceanside Warriors 22
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: NFL Playoff Guide: Postseason bracket much clearer with 1 week remaining in regular season
item.description: It's Week 18 of the NFL season, which means just one more weekend remains before postseason action begins. The two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs and star quarterback Patrick Mahomes look like a formidable opponent once again and have already clinched the No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2024 Holiday Bowl: Homegrown Cougars leave it all on the field in front of hometown crowd
item.description: While a depleted Washington State may not have tasted any eggnog this year in the Holiday Bowl after falling short to Syracuse 52-35, a few San Diego locals still making a memory of a lifetime playing on the big stage in front of their hometown crowd.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Thompson-Herro fight leads to ejections of multiple players and coaches in Heat's victory in Houston
item.description: Rockets forward Amen Thompson threw Heat guard Tyler Herro to the floor to trigger an altercation that resulted in six ejections in the closing minute of Miami's 104-100 victory over Houston on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
